items.line_en: English class at the clinic.

coach.say: English class at the clinic.
coach.hint: Chunk it: English class at the clinic.

items.line_en: Hello. Hello. What can I do for you today?

coach.say: Hello. Hello. What can I do for you today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello. / Hello. / What can I do for you today?

items.line_en: I would like to see Dr. David. Do you have an appointment?

coach.say: I would like to see Dr. David. Do you have an appointment?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would like to see Dr. / David. / Do you have an appointment?

items.line_en: No, I don't. Dr. David is busy with a patient.

coach.say: No, I don't. Dr. David is busy with a patient.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / I don't. / Dr. / David is busy with a patient.

items.line_en: If you want to see Dr. David then you need to make an appointment.

coach.say: If you want to see Dr. David then you need to make an appointment.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If you want to see Dr. / David then you need to make an appointment.

items.line_en: I would like to make an appointment.

coach.say: I would like to make an appointment.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would like to make an appointment.

items.line_en: Can I have your name and age? Please. My name is Kate.

coach.say: Can I have your name and age? Please. My name is Kate.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can I have your name and age? / Please. / My name is Kate.

items.line_en: I am 23.

coach.say: I am 23.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I am 23.

items.line_en: And what is your diagnosis? I think I have a fever.

coach.say: And what is your diagnosis? I think I have a fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And what is your diagnosis? / I think I have a fever.

items.line_en: Here is your token number.

coach.say: Here is your token number.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here is your token number.

items.line_en: Please wait in the waiting hall. I will let you know when your turn comes.

coach.say: Please wait in the waiting hall. I will let you know when your turn comes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please wait in the waiting hall. / I will let you know when your turn comes.

items.line_en: Fine. Thank you.

coach.say: Fine. Thank you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Fine. / Thank you.

items.line_en: I have a fever. I am not feeling well.

coach.say: I have a fever. I am not feeling well.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have a fever. / I am not feeling well.

items.line_en: Let me examine you.

coach.say: Let me examine you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let me examine you.

items.line_en: You have a mild fever.

coach.say: You have a mild fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You have a mild fever.

items.line_en: I feel terrible.

coach.say: I feel terrible.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I feel terrible.

items.line_en: Let me check your blood pressure level. Roll up your sleeve.

coach.say: Let me check your blood pressure level. Roll up your sleeve.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let me check your blood pressure level. / Roll up your sleeve.

items.line_en: Your blood pressure level is fine. 120 over 80. No need to worry.

coach.say: Your blood pressure level is fine. 120 over 80. No need to worry.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Your blood pressure level is fine. / 120 over 80. / No need to worry.

items.line_en: I am prescribing you some medicines. Here is the prescription.

coach.say: I am prescribing you some medicines. Here is the prescription.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I am prescribing you some medicines. / Here is the prescription.

items.line_en: Take two tablets through ice a day. With meal or without meal.

coach.say: Take two tablets through ice a day. With meal or without meal.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Take two tablets through ice a day. / With meal or without meal.

items.line_en: After having meal. You can take your medicine and have some rest after taking the medicine.

coach.say: After having meal. You can take your medicine and have some rest after taking the medicine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After having meal. / You can take your medicine and have some rest after taking the medicine.

items.line_en: Thank you. Get well soon.

coach.say: Thank you. Get well soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you. / Get well soon.

items.line_en: Hello. Hello. What can I do for you?

coach.say: Hello. Hello. What can I do for you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello. / Hello. / What can I do for you?

items.line_en: Give me these medicines according to this prescription.

coach.say: Give me these medicines according to this prescription.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Give me these medicines according to this prescription.

items.line_en: Okay, Mom. I will be right back.

coach.say: Okay, Mom. I will be right back.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / Mom. / I will be right back.

items.line_en: Here you go. Thanks. How much is this medicine?

coach.say: Here you go. Thanks. How much is this medicine?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here you go. / Thanks. / How much is this medicine?

items.line_en: It costs $8.67.

coach.say: It costs $8.67.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It costs $8.67.

items.line_en: Here you go. Here is your change.

coach.say: Here you go. Here is your change.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here you go. / Here is your change.

items.line_en: What's the matter? I have a cough.

coach.say: What's the matter? I have a cough.
coach.hint: Chunk it: What's the matter? / I have a cough.

items.line_en: You should have this cough syrup. You will feel better. What's the matter?

coach.say: You should have this cough syrup. You will feel better. What's the matter?
coach.hint: Chunk it: You should have this cough syrup. / You will feel better. / What's the matter?

items.line_en: I have a headache. You should rest. What's the matter? I have a fever.

coach.say: I have a headache. You should rest. What's the matter? I have a fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have a headache. / You should rest. / What's the matter? / I have a fever.

coach.hint: Chunk it: What's the matter? / I have a backache. / I feel terrible.

items.line_en: What's the matter? I have a chest pain. I am not feeling well. You must go to the hospital right away.

coach.say: What's the matter? I have a chest pain. I am not feeling well. You must go to the hospital right away.
coach.hint: Chunk it: What's the matter? / I have a chest pain. / I am not feeling well. / You must go to the hospital right away.

coach.hint: Chunk it: It can be heart attack.
